title: KitchenPerfected 700w Variable Speed Stainless Steel Hand Blender, 15 speed, turbo, Long-life Motor, for Soup or Baby Food - E5024SS
features: EXCEPTIONAL QUALITY - The full copper DC motor is very quiet, powerful and the stainless steel design withstands the rigors of the modern kitchen environments.

15 SPEED CONTROL - Easy to select your desired speed with a simple twist at your fingertips meaning you can blend or chop your ingredients precisely to just the right consistency. The Turbo function immediately actives the maximum speed allowing you to pulse ingredients between slow and fast speeds to blend, chop, whisk, whip, emulsify etc

MODERN DESIGN: The sleek and modern design has a comfortable and ergonomic rubberised handle allowing full control. The stainless steel shaft detaches for easy cleaning and storage, which is also dishwasher safe.

POWERFUL MOTOR - Simple to use and equipped with a very powerful energy saving 700W motor this hand blender makes light work of many ingredients, blending its way to delicious smoothies, Soups or Baby Food.
FOOD GRADE STEEL - The SUS304 high food grade stainless steel shaft and blade reduces the possibility of food contamination and provides a surface that is sterile and easily cleaned.
description: Making smoothies, soups, sauces, dips or creating the perfectly blended fresh baby food has never been so simple! With this powerful 700W motor Hand Blender from KitchenPerfected you can do everything and more! The fifteen (15) individual speed settings with turbo function are in easy access that provides full and continuous control and allows you to create perfect and delicious results every time. Detachable design and ergonomic handle offers a non-slip and comfortable rubberised grip which will not let your hands tire. The dishwasher safe stainless steel blades and shaft make light work of any vegetables, fruits, nuts etc Complete with a few recipes to help you on your way! Box includes: 1x Hand Blender 1x Instruction Manual
